text: The Debug Draw api can be used for drawing geometric primitives for debug purposes.
Adds a named aabb debug draw.
Adds a named arrow debug draw.
params: The to position. Defaults to the from position plus one along the z axis. (World up vector)

text: Adds a named box debug draw.
params: The box rotation. Defaults to identity.

text: Adds a named sphere debug draw.
Adds text in world debug draw.
params: The world position of the text.
If the text should fade. Defaults to false.
The scale of the text. Defaults to 30.

text: Adds a named transform debug draw.
Removes all debug draws beginning with a given name.
params: The name to match (Defaults to "", matching all debug draws).

text: Draws an arrow.
params: The starting position of the arrow.
The ending position of the arrow. Defaults to the starting position plus one unit along the z-axis (world up vector).
The color of the arrow. Defaults to white.

text: Draws a box.
params: The minimum extent of the box.
The maximum extent of the box.
The rotation of the box. Defaults to identity.
The color of the box. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Draws a circle.
params: The center position of the circle.
The radius of the circle. Defaults to 0.125.
The color of the circle. Defaults to white.

text: Draws a rectangle.
params: The minimum extent of the rectangle.
The maximum extent of the rectangle.
The color of the rectangle. Defaults to white.

text: Draws a sphere.
params: The center position of the sphere.
The radius of the sphere. Defaults to 0.125.
The color of the sphere. Defaults to white.

text: Flashes an axis-aligned bounding box for a specified duration.
params: The minimum world extent of the box.
The maximum world extent of the box.
The color of the box. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Flashes an arrow for a specified duration.
params: The starting position of the arrow.
The ending position of the arrow. Defaults to the starting position plus one unit along the z-axis (world up vector).
The color of the arrow. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Flashes an arrow for a specified duration.
params: The starting position of the arrow.
The ending position of the arrow. Defaults to the starting position plus one unit along the z-axis (world up vector).
The color of the arrow. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Flashes a box for a specified duration.
params: The minimum extent of the box.
The maximum extent of the box.
The rotation of the box. Defaults to identity.
The color of the box. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Flashes a box for a specified duration.
params: The minimum extent of the box.
The maximum extent of the box.
The rotation of the box. Defaults to identity.
The color of the box. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Flashes a circle for a specified duration.
params: The center position of the circle.
The radius of the circle. Defaults to 0.125.
The color of the circle. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Flashes a rectangle for a specified duration.
params: The minimum extent of the rectangle.
The maximum extent of the rectangle.
The color of the rectangle. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Flashes a sphere for a specified duration.
params: The center position of the sphere.
The radius of the sphere. Defaults to 0.125.
The color of the sphere. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Flashes a sphere for a specified duration.
params: The center position of the sphere.
The radius of the sphere. Defaults to 0.125.
The color of the sphere. Defaults to white.
The duration of the flash animation in seconds. Defaults to 0.5 seconds.

text: Draws text in world debug draw.
params: The world position of the text.
If the text should fade. Defaults to false.
The scale of the text. Defaults to 30.
Time to show text. Defaults to 0.5.

text: Removes a named arrow debug draw.
Removes a named box debug draw.
Removes a named sphere debug draw.
Remove text in world debug draw.
Removes a named transform debug draw.
